Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove untrusted content safety, semantic reading, keyboard focus, status, reflow, media, and motion; every external value must remain unknown until current runtime validation admits it; then reorder one timer, Promise, claim, lease, fencing, worker, disconnect, or shutdown settlement and exclude stale effects.
